prompt: Create a cinematic steampunk fantasy portrait of a confident female airship captain in the cockpit of a Victorian flying vessel. She is an elegant young airship captain with long windswept chestnut brown hair, smoky makeup, and a poised, commanding expression, standing three-quarter view beside a massive polished wooden ship wheel. She wears a fitted dark brown leather aviator outfit with a corseted bodice, lace-trim neckline, high collar, leather jacket, brass buttons, belts, chains, buckles, gloves, ornate clockwork medallions, and a leather pilot cap topped with brass goggles and tiny dangling charms. One hand rests on her hip while the other grips a brass throttle lever near a panel of exactly four round analog gauges mounted in a square black-and-brass frame. The environment is a richly detailed airship bridge filled with dark varnished wood, copper pipes, brass valves, riveted metal supports, mechanical instruments, and curved panoramic windows. Outside the windows is a bright sky of billowing white clouds with exactly five visible flying craft: one large central zeppelin, two smaller distant airships to the left, one floating spherical craft near the upper right, and one ornate floating city-like airship on the far right. Use warm golden-hour light, dramatic rim lighting, high contrast, glossy leather textures, intricate brass reflections, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed realistic digital painting, cinematic composition, 4:3 aspect ratio, no text, no watermark.
